_comment: Maps Essentials PBTerrain tags (reference/scripts_dump/100_PBTerrain_v17.rb) to pokeemerald-expansion metatile behaviors (MB_*). Tag 0-22. Terrain tag 1 (Ledge) is handled specially via ledge_directions (see terrain_tags.py) rather than a single MB_* value.

1.note: Ledge — special-cased via ledge_directions; MB_NORMAL is only the unmapped fallback

6.note: Beach — excluded from Uranium's isWater checks, land tile

10.note: Essentials TallGrass: blocks bike, double battles

19.note: Nuclear — custom engine work deferred to Phase 6

21.note: junk tag, not defined in PBTerrain, engine ignores
